name: pr-body-markdown
description: Codex skill for drafting concise, reviewer-friendly pull request bodies.

interface.shortDescription: Draft or revise PR bodies in a consistent Markdown format.
interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex skill that structures PR bodies with Summary, What, Why, optional Review Notes, and Validation sections.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me draft or revise a pull request body using the pr-body-markdown format.
